title: BBC News Refusal
prompts: What's the latest news from the BBC?

messages.content: What's the latest news from the BBC?

I can’t provide BBC news. I can help with Drosophila neuroscience topics and literature instead. What would you like to explore?

Possible options:
- Latest Drosophila neuroscience papers (I can search PubMed and fetch abstracts, and include links to the full text when available)
- Preprints on Drosophila neural circuits (bioRxiv/medRxiv)
- VFB data: look up a brain region, neuron type, or connectivity data, with term info and analyses
- FlyBase/NeuroFly documentation or genetic tools relevant to Drosophila neuroscience

2–3 quick questions to narrow things down:
1) Do you want recent papers (e.g., past month) or a broader window (past year or 2024–present)?
2) Any specific brain region or neuron type you’re interested in (e.g., mushroom body, central complex, optic lobe, specific neuron class)?
3) Do you want PubMed articles only, or include preprints too?

If you’d like, I can start a PubMed search for recent Drosophila neural circuit papers right away.
